name: kuira-wp-quality
description: Quality + correctness for WordPress plugins in Claude Code — PHPUnit (wp-env), Playwright E2E, WordPress Playground, PHPStan static analysis, security auditing, and the official Plugin Check, plus security/code-review/performance/accessibility auditor agents and an opt-in commit quality gate.
author: Mohammad Limon Mia

recommends.kuira-wp-core: the core build skills this pairs with
